skills.name: Deeds of Valor
skills.description: Increases final damage of Doppelsoeldner skill giving to enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Increases Final Damage of Doppelsoeldner skill by CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Punish
skills.description: Move to the targeted enemy and stab deeply. Increases damage by 50% to the knocked down enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Increases damage given to the knocked down enemy by 50%
Movement Distance: 140

skills.name: Cyclone
skills.description: Use centrifugal force to continuously attack enemies. You can move slowly while casting the skill.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.2 seconds
Duration: CaptionRatio2 seconds
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Zornhau
skills.description: Inflict damage and put the enemy into a state of shock with a big slash attack.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
[Shock] Duration: 5 seconds

skills.name: Redel
skills.description: Deals successive attacks to an enemy in front by swinging your weapon. Allows you to use Redel after Zucken.

skills.name: Zucken
skills.description: Slash side-to-side with your weapon and deal continuous damage to an enemy in front of you. Allows you to use Zucken after Zornhau.

skills.name: Zwerchhau
skills.description: Swing the sword in one hand to attack a wide range of enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Sturtzhau
skills.description: Strike with your weapon diagonally. Ignores a portion of enemy Defense. Critical Rate doubles when the attack is accurate with the counter.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Ignores enemy Defense by 15%

attributes.name: Cyclone: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Cyclone] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Doppelsoeldner: Tough
attributes.description: * Reduces your Stamina by 5, but adds 3% critical chance per attribute level and increases AoE attack ratio +1 per attribute level in Doppelsoeldner skills

attributes.name: [Arts] Punish: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Punish] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Cyclone: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Cyclone] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Zornhau: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Zornhau] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Redel] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Sturtzhau: Enhanced Upgrade

attributes.name: [Arts] Cyclone: Tornado
attributes.description:
* Decreases attack range largely, decreases attack cycle and AoE Attack Ratio in half

* Cannot be activated while using [Cyclone]

* Increases cooldown by 15 seconds

attributes.name: Deeds of Valor: Double Pay Earn
attributes.description:
* Duration of [Deeds of Valor] buff is changed to 9 + [skill level] x 1.5 seconds, Final Damage increase effect of Doppelsoeldner is removed

* Decreases Physical, Magic Defense by 25%

* When Doppelsoeldner's skill is accurate, additional strike with equal damage occurs

* Deeds of Valor applied will be removed when turning ON/OFF the Arts

attributes.name: Zwerchhau: Vint
attributes.description: * Overheat is changed to 1, struck enemies knock down towards you
